overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic urban plaza in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring modern architecture with towering glass buildings and digital billboards. The camera moves steadily through the open pedestrian space before ascending a large staircase into a covered transit structure.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, sunlit futuristic plaza with a towering glass building featuring a prominent W logo straight ahead. Landscaped trees and modern benches line the walkway as the camera moves forward through the sparse crowd.

turning right to face the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the imposing staircase structure of the transit station, transitioning from open plaza to a semi-covered entrance area. Pedestrians move in various directions as the camera turns toward the stairs, with the large building fading from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered staircase ascending to upper transit level

ascending the stairs alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs alongside other pedestrians entering the covered transit area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered stairwell and begins ascending the concrete stairs, flanked by teal walls and wooden railings. The environment becomes enclosed and artificially lit as the camera climbs past pedestrians moving in both directions, leaving the outdoor plaza behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air futuristic plaza into the enclosed, artificial environment of a transit station. It begins by gliding through a sunlit pedestrian space lined with modern benches and landscaped trees, moving directly toward a towering glass building marked with a prominent W logo. As the camera approaches the imposing transit structure, the open plaza gives way to a semi-covered entrance where the surrounding cityscape begins to fade from view. The scene then shifts inward as the camera turns and ascends a concrete stairwell, flanked by teal walls and wooden railings. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed and artificially lit as the camera climbs past a stream of pedestrians, leaving the outdoor brightness behind.
